step_rationale: Cardiac/muscle E3 ligase upregulated in myocardial damage.
mechanism: KBTBD10 is a cardiac/muscle-specific ubiquitin ligase elevated during myocardial ischemic injury and proteolytic remodeling in acute myocardial infarction.

references.title: Circulating E3 ligases are novel and sensitive biomarkers for diagnosis of acute myocardial infarction.
